name: coding-telemetry-feedback-net
description: Offline neural network code critic — analyzes Python code quality, finds bugs/style/perf/security issues, and suggests refactorings. Runs 100% locally with no API calls.
author: AGNT User

schema.title: Code Feedback Neural Net
schema.description: Analyze Python code quality using a local neural network. Returns quality score, categorized issues, refactoring suggestions, and positive notes. Runs 100% offline — no API calls.

filePath.description: Optional file path for context-aware analysis (e.g. src/utils/helper.py)

telemetry.description: Optional JSON telemetry data: git diffs, edit counts, file age, etc. Example: {"num_edits": 5, "num_additions": 20}

quality_score.description: Overall code quality score from 0.0 to 1.0

confidence.description: Model confidence in its feedback (0.0 to 1.0)

issues.description: JSON array of categorized issues (bugs, style, performance, security, maintainability, pythonic)

suggestions.description: JSON array of ranked refactoring suggestions

positive_notes.description: JSON array of positive observations about the code

feedback_text.description: Full human-readable feedback report with emoji indicators
